<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\CssSelector\Exception; /** * ParseException is thrown when a CSS selector syntax is not valid. * * This component is a port of the Python cssselect library, * which is copyright Ian Bicking, @see https://github.com/SimonSapin/cssselect. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class ParseException extends \Exception implements ExceptionInterface { }
